narrative:
Pleasant Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 1,165 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.1 percentage points.
